title: dysoxylum kanehirae
intro: Dysoxylum kanehirae, also known as the Kanehirae tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. Native to the Philippines, this tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The bark and roots of the Kanehirae tree are used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as pain relief and improved immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
